customChecks.description:
Sub-check:
 * `TEXT_FEATURES` - This check verifies the presence of important text features specific to each ID document.
 * `MRZ` - This check returns a score indicating whether the Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) has been falsified.
 * `BLACK_WHITE` - This check returns the probability the input ID document is not a black and white photocopy.
 * `EXPIRY` - This check returns a binary score on whether the ID document has expired.
 * `PHOTO_SUBSTITUTION` - This check returns the probability an ID document has not been falsified via photo substitution.

failureReason.description:
Failure reason if any.
 * `NONE` - No failure encountered on the check.
 * `NOT_READABLE` - General failure on the OCR or the check itself.
 * `NOT_APPLICABLE` - The requested check is not applicable on the authenticity template of the current requested document.

customChecks.description:
Sub-check:
 * `TEXT_FEATURES` - This check verifies the presence of important text features specific to each ID document.
 * `MRZ` - This check returns a score indicating whether the Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) has been falsified.
 * `BLACK_WHITE` - This check returns the probability the input ID document is not a black and white photocopy.
 * `EXPIRY` - This check returns a binary score on whether the ID document has expired.
 * `PHOTO_SUBSTITUTION` - This check returns the probability an ID document has not been falsified via photo substitution.

customChecks.description:
Sub-check:
 * `TEXT_FEATURES` - This check verifies the presence of important text features specific to each ID document.
 * `MRZ` - This check returns a score indicating whether the Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) has been falsified.
 * `BLACK_WHITE` - This check returns the probability the input ID document is not a black and white photocopy.
 * `EXPIRY` - This check returns a binary score on whether the ID document has expired.
 * `PHOTO_SUBSTITUTION` - This check returns the probability an ID document has not been falsified via photo substitution.
